stages.concept:
# Unit 139: 현재분사와 과거분사 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **현재분사와 과거분사**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **현재분사 (-ing)** — ~하는, ~하고 있는 (능동/진행)

> The **singing** bird is beautiful.
> 노래하고 있는 새가 아름답다.

> I saw a **running** dog.
> 나는 달리고 있는 개를 보았다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **과거분사 (p.p.)** — ~된, ~당한 (수동/완료)

> The **broken** window needs to be fixed.
> 깨진 창문은 고쳐져야 한다.

> I found a **stolen** bag.
> 나는 도난당한 가방을 발견했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 핵심 차이:

| | 현재분사 (-ing) | 과거분사 (p.p.) |
|------|------|------|
| 의미 | 능동 / 진행 (~하는) | 수동 / 완료 (~된) |
| 예시 | boiling water (끓고 있는 물) | boiled water (끓인 물) |

> a **sleeping** baby — 자고 있는 아기 (능동/진행)
> a **locked** door — 잠긴 문 (수동/완료)

> **falling** leaves — 떨어지고 있는 나뭇잎
> **fallen** leaves — 떨어진 나뭇잎

**Q. 다음 문장의 괄호 안에서 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"Look at that ( crying / cried ) baby." 
1. crying ✅
2. cried

👩‍🏫 선생님: 아기가 스스로 우는(능동) 진행 중인 상황이므로, 진행/능동의 의미를 지닌 현재분사(crying)가 정답이랍니다!

🧑‍🎓 학생: -ing는 능동/진행(~하는), p.p.는 수동/완료(~된)! boiling vs boiled 같은 예로 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 139: 현재분사와 과거분사 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Look at that (     ) dog.
> **정답** sleeping

---

**02.** I read an ? book yesterday.
> **정답** interesting

---

**03.** She was ? by the news.
> **정답** surprised

---

**04.** The movie was really ? .
> **정답** boring

---

**05.** He looked ? at the test result.
> **정답** disappointed

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I am interesting in music.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** interesting → interested

---

**07.** The movie was bored.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** bored → boring

---

**08.** She was surprising by the gift.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** surprising → surprised

---

**09.** The news was shocked.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** shocked → shocking

---

**10.** He was exciting about the trip.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** exciting → excited

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그 영화는 재미있었다.
The movie was .
> **정답** interesting

---

**12.** 나는 그 영화에 흥미를 느꼈다.
I was in the movie.
> **정답** interested

---

**13.** 그 소식은 놀라웠다.
The news was .
> **정답** surprising

---

**14.** 나는 그 소식에 놀랐다.
I was by the news.
> **정답** surprised

---

**15.** 그 책은 지루했다.
The book was .
> **정답** boring

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 그 결과에 실망했다.
was I disappointed by the result
> **정답** I / was / disappointed / by / the / result

---

**17.** 그 경기는 흥미진진했다.
The game exciting was
> **정답** The / game / was / exciting

---

**18.** 그녀는 시험에 지루함을 느꼈다.
was She bored by the test
> **정답** She / was / bored / by / the / test

---

**19.** 그 이야기는 감동적이었다.
The story was moving
> **정답** The / story / was / moving

---

**20.** 나는 선물에 감동받았다.
was I moved by the gift
> **정답** I / was / moved / by / the / gift
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 139: 현재분사와 과거분사 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom sat next to the __________ puppy under the
tree.
slept
sleep
sleeping
to sleep
> **정답** sleeping

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
This is a very __________ book.
I am very __________ in this book.
interesting - interested
interested - interesting
interested - interested
interesting - interesting
> **정답** interesting - interested

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
He is __________ by the sound of something
__________.
frightened- falling
frightening - fallen
frightening - falling
frighten - fall
> **정답** frightened- falling

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 문장으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
I watched the __________ movie yesterday.
to bore
boring
bored
bore
> **정답** boring

---

**05.** 다음 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리
짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She took care of the (graze) cow.
He hugged a (cry) baby.
grazing - crying
graze - cry
graze - crying
grazing - cried
• graze 풀을뜯다
> **정답** grazing - crying

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
(2개)
My beloved sister's birthday is coming
soon. I prepared a surprise party for her with my
friends. The party will be a lot of fun and she will
be very surprising and pleasing.
> **정답** beloved, coming, surprised, pleased

---

**07.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 문장으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은
말을 고르시오.
I saw a girl __________ in the morning.
track suits wearing
to wear track suits
worn track suits
wearing track suits
• track suits 체육복
> **정답** wearing track suits

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I bought a camera __________ in Korea.
made
making
make
to make
> **정답** made

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The man living in the house is my uncle.
We played an exciting game.
I am very boring with this movie.
We drank relaxing tea in the garden.
> **정답** I am very boring with this movie.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
We can't forget the amazed view.
We accept that disappointed result.
The museum has some pictures painted by
Picasso.
She was very surprised at the news.
> **정답** We accept that disappointed result., We can't forget the amazed view.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The article posting on that blog is about dogs.
The mountain covering with snow is beautiful.
The flowers planting in the garden are
colorful.
Look at the bird singing in the tree.
> **정답** Look at the bird singing in the tree.

---

**12.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
콩으로 만들어진 제품은 몸에 좋다.
Products make of beans are good for your
health.
Products are made of beans are good for your
health.
Products making of beans are good for your
health.
Products made of beans are good for your
health.
> **정답** Products made of beans are good for your health.

---

**13.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
루돌프는 아이들을 위한 선물로 가득 찬 마차를 끌었다.
Rudolph pulled a wagon filled with gifts for
children.
Rudolph pulled a wagon is filled with gifts for
children.
Rudolph pulled a wagon filling with gifts for
children.
Rudolph pulled a wagon is filling with gifts for
children.
> **정답** Rudolph pulled a wagon filled with gifts for children.

---

**14.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
오늘 도난당한 그림은 나의 것이다.
The picture is stealing today is mine.
The picture stealing today is mine.
The picture steal today is mine.
The picture stolen today is mine.
> **정답** The picture stolen today is mine.

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I sold the house repairing
yesterday.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** repairing → repaired

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The man bite by a dog went
to the hospital.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** bite → bitten

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I fixed the break computer
yesterday.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** break → broken

---

**18.** 다음 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리
짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I had an apple (put) on the table.
There are people (walk) to the building.
put - walked
put - walking
putting - walked
put - walk
> **정답** put - walking

---

**19.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
My brother likes cards painting
red the most.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** painting → painted

---

**20.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
The book write by him is
very popular.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** write → written
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 139 현재분사와 과거분사중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
구워진 빵은 맛있는 냄새가 났다.
힌트 (     ) bake, bread
The  (     )   (     )  smelled delicious.
정답 baked, bread

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그 유니폼을 입은 소년은 우리 학교 학생이다.
힌트 (     ) wear, the uniform
The boy  (     )   (     )   (     )  is a student at our
school.
정답 wearing, the, uniform

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
우리는 이번 여행에서 흥미로운 경험을 했다.
힌트 (     ) interest, experiences
We had  (     )   (     )  on this trip.
정답 interesting, experiences

---

**04.** 다음 그림을 보고, 주어진 표현과 현재분사 또는
![그림](public/images/units/139_desc_01.webp)
과거분사를 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
hold, the puppy
The girl  (     )   (     )   (     )  passed by me.
정답 holding, the, puppy

---

**05.** 다음 그림을 보고, 주어진 표현과 현재분사 또는
![그림](public/images/units/139_desc_02.webp)
과거분사를 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
wave, their hands
I saw people  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 waving, their, hands

---

**06.** 다음 그림을 보고, 주어진 표현과 현재분사 또는
![그림](public/images/units/139_desc_03.webp)
과거분사를 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
plant, in the garden
Tulips  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  are my
mother's pride.
정답 planted, in, the, garden

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 다친 손가락을 치료했다.
힌트 (     ) injure, finger
He treated my  (     )   (     ) .
• injure 부상을(입다, 입히다)
정답 injured, finger

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
선적된 짐은 항구에서 출발한다.
힌트 (     ) ship, luggage
  (     )  departs from the port.
• ship 수송하다
정답 Shipped, luggage

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 깨끗해진 방을 보여주었다.
힌트 (     ) clean, room
I showed them the  (     )   (     ) .
정답 cleaned, room

---

**10.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오.
The book [publish]  in 1908 was written by Lucy
Maud Montgomery. The book is [title] (     )  'Anne of
Green Gables.' Anne, the main character, is] a cute girl
with red hair. This book [describe]  her growth
period became very popular.]
정답 published, titled, describing

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 139: 현재분사와 과거분사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom sat next to the __________ kitten on the sofa. slept sleep sleeping to sleep
> 정답: sleeping

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
This is a very __________ movie.
I am very __________ in this movie.
exciting - excited excited - exciting excited - excited exciting - exciting
> 정답: exciting - excited

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She is __________ by the sight of something __________.
frightened- moving frightening - moved frightening - moving frighten - move
> 정답: frightened- moving

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 문장으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I watched the __________ lecture yesterday. to tire tiring tired tire
> 정답: tiring

---

**05.** 다음 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She took care of the (sleep) baby.
He hugged a (shiver) puppy.
sleeping - shivering sleep - shiver sleep - shivering sleeping - shivered
> 정답: sleeping - shivering

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
(2개) My beloved brother's graduation is coming soon.
I prepared a special gift for him with my friends.
The gift will be a lot of fun and he will be very surprising and pleasing.
> 정답: beloved, coming, surprised, pleased

---

**07.** 다음 두 문장을 하나의 문장으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I saw a boy __________ in the park.
a scooter riding to ride a scooter ridden a scooter riding a scooter
> 정답: riding a scooter

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I bought a toy __________ in Japan. made making make to make
> 정답: made

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The woman living in the apartment is my aunt.
We played an exciting game.
I am very boring with this lecture.
We drank refreshing juice in the garden.
> 정답: I am very boring with this lecture.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
We can't forget the amazed scenery.
We accept that disappointed result.
The gallery has some paintings drawn by a famous artist.
She was very surprised at the announcement.
> 정답: We accept that disappointed result., We can't forget

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The note posting on that board is about the meeting.
The mountain covering with clouds is beautiful.
The flowers planting in the pot are colorful.
Look at the dog running in the yard.
> 정답: Look at the dog running in the yard.

---

**12.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
콩으로 만들어진 음식은 몸에 좋다.
Food make of beans is good for your health.
Food is made of beans is good for your health.
Food making of beans is good for your health.
Food made of beans is good for your health.
> 정답: Food made of beans is good for your health.

---

**13.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
산타는 아이들을 위한 선물로 가득 찬 자루를 들고 갔다.
Santa carried a sack filled with gifts for children.
Santa carried a sack is filled with gifts for children.
Santa carried a sack filling with gifts for children.
Santa carried a sack is filling with gifts for children.
> 정답: Santa carried a sack filled with gifts for children.

---

**14.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
오늘 분실된 그 열쇠는 나의 것이다.
The key is losing today is mine.
The key losing today is mine.
The key lose today is mine.
The key lost today is mine.
> 정답: The key lost today is mine.

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. I  sold  the  bike  repairing  yesterday. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: repairing → repaired

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  boy  bite  by  a  bee  went  to the  nurse. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: bite → bitten

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. I  fixed  the  break  window  yesterday. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
